questions.question: Consider the diagrams below: The above diagrams show the position of the Earth, the Moon and the Sun where (UPSC Prelims 1999)

options.label: A
options.text: Only situation A explains the spring tides.

options.label: B
options.text: Only situation B explains the spring tides.

options.label: C
options.text: Both situations A and B explain the spring tides.

answer.label: C
answer.text: Both situations A and B explain the spring tides.

questions.explanation: Spring tide is a tide in which the difference between high and low tide is the greatest. Spring tides occur when the Moon is either new or full, and the Sun, the Moon, and the Earth are aligned. When this is the case, their collective gravitational pull on the Earth’s water is strengthened. Compare neap tide.

questions.question: Recently, to which of the following countries did India offer to build Buddha Temple?
questions.explanation: Top religious officials and local people in central China’s Henan province have warmly welcomed India’s initiative to build a Buddhist temple in the historic city of Luoyang. During Chinese Premier Wen Jiabao’s recent visit to India, the two government signed the Memorandum on Construction of an Indian style Buddhist temple on the western side of the White House temple in Luoyang, Henan province.

questions.question: 10th chief electoral commissioner TN Seshan, who recently passed away, was from which state?
questions.explanation: Tirunellai Narayana Iyer Seshan, the man behind several electoral reforms passed away due to a cardiac arrest. He was 87 years old and was not well for the past couple of years. He was the 10th Chief Election Commissioner (CEC). He served between 1990 and 1996. Tirunellai Narayana Iyer Seshan, the man behind several electoral reforms passed away due to a cardiac arrest. He was 87 years old and was not well for the past couple of years. He was the 10th Chief Election Commissioner (CEC). TN Seshan was a 1955 batch retired IAS officer of Tamil Nadu cadre. He was born in Palakkad district of Kerala. Before becoming a CEC, he served around 18 cabinet secretaries. He has also won the Ramon Magsaysay Award for his services in 1986. The award is considered as Asia’s Nobel Prize.

questions.question: 11th BRICS Summit-2019 has recently started in Brazil under which theme?

options.label: A
options.text: Stronger partnership for a brighter future

options.label: B
options.text: Economic Growth for an Innovative Future

options.label: C
options.text: BRICS Partnership – a Powerful Factor of Global Development

options.label: D
options.text: Building Responsive, Inclusive and Collective Solutions

answer.label: B
answer.text: Economic Growth for an Innovative Future

questions.explanation: 11th BRICS Summit has started under the theme ‘Economic Growth for an Innovative Future. BRICS brings together five major emerging economies-Brazil, Russia, India, China, South Africa- comprising 42 per cent of the world’s population, having 23 per cent of t he global GDP and around 17 per cent of the share in world trade. The five nations account for 50 per cent of the world economic growth, 42.58 per cent of the world population and 26.6 per cent of the World Land Area.

questions.question: Which country is to host the 2019 World Kabaddi Cup?
questions.explanation: India is to host the 2019 World Kabaddi Cup from 1-9 December 2019. It will be organized by the Punjab State government. The inauguration ceremony of the event will be held on 1 December at Guru Nanak Stadium, Sultanpur Lodhi, and four matches are scheduled for the opening day. Nine teams, namely India, England, Sri Lanka, Kenya, USA, Australia, New Zealand, Pakistan, and Canada, are expected to take part.

questions.question: The 29th Regional Contact Points meeting of the Asia Pacific region of the World Customs Organization is being held at which city?
questions.explanation: The 29th Regional Contact Points (RCP) meeting of the Asia Pacific (A/P) region of the World Customs Organization (WCO) is being held at Puducherry from 18-20 November 2019. The meeting was organized by the Central Board of Indirect Taxes and Customs (CBIC). This annual meeting is designed to address regional development in a number of areas. It also discusses various issues linked to cross border trade procedures and to enhance communication and experience sharing between the member countries. The meeting highlighted the cultural importance of Puducherry. The meeting discussed issues of importance for the region and the ideas put forth by the member countries.

questions.question: Which two veteran actresses received the Akkineni Nageswara Rao (ANR) National Award for the years 2019 and 2018, respectively?
questions.explanation: Veteran actor Rekha and the late Sridevi conferred the Akkineni Nageswara Rao (ANR) National Award for the years 2019 and 2018, announced actor Nagarjuna in the presence of industrialist T Subbarami Reddy at an event held in Hyderabad.Instituted by the Akkineni International Foundation to honour ANR, the awards were presented at Annapurna Studios in the presence of actor Chiranjeevi and other Telugu cinema dignitaries.

questions.question: World Philosophy Day is observed on 21 November every year.The day was instituted by which organization?
questions.explanation: World Philosophy Day is observed on 21 November every year. The day is observed every third Thursday of November month. On this day, UNESCO highlighted the value of philosophy for the development of human thought, for each culture and individual. The 2019 observance highlights the importance of philosophy in different regional contexts. The day aims to obtain regional contributions to global debates on contemporary challenges that support social transformations. The purpose of the approach is to foster regional dynamics, stimulating global collaboration to address major challenges such as artificial intelligence (AI), radicalization, migration, or environmental change.World Philosophy Day was instituted in 2002 by the United Nations Educational, Scientific and Cultural Organization (UNESCO).

questions.question: Lachit Divas was recently celebrated in which state?
questions.explanation: On 24 November,2019 each year Lachit Divas (Lachit Day) is celebrated statewide in Assam to commemorate the heroism of Lachit Borphukan and the victory of the Assamese army at the Battle of Saraighat. Lachit Divas is celebrated to promote the ideals of Lachit Borphukan – the legendary general of Assam’s history.

questions.question: Who has been conferred with the 27th Ekalabya Award 2019?
questions.explanation: Jhilli Dalabehera, Odisha weightlifter has been awarded the 27th Ekalabya Award 2019, the annual award organized by Indian Metals Public Charitable Trust (IMPaCT) managed by IMFA (Indian Metals and Ferro Alloys limited) group. The award comprises a cash prize of Rs.5 lakhs along with citation.
